timeline.title: Research Intern
timeline.summary: Focus: code agents with multi-turn reinforcement learning.
highlights: Conducting research on code agents especially in multi-turn reinforcement learning.
Training SOTA agentic coding models, contributed in Qwen3-Coder series.

timeline.title: Natural Language Processing Intern
timeline.company: Search and Strategy Department, Baidu China Co., Ltd.
timeline.summary: Worked on e-commerce shopping search ranking and query-document matching.
highlights: Designed and developed search algorithms under e-commerce shopping scenarios.
Optimized Query-Doc correlation calculation and ranking using semantic understanding techniques.
Improved ERNIE-based retrieval adaptation to goods' property information, raising recall at 90 precision from 82.6% to 88.9%.
